title: The Goose's Gold
desc: A sunken-treasure scam in Key West — and a boat named the Golden Goose. 🪙

q.en: Where do Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose go on winter vacation?
q.zh: 丁克、乔什和露丝·罗丝寒假去了哪里度假？

options.en: Key West, Florida, to visit Ruth Rose's grandmother
options.zh: 佛罗里达州的基韦斯特，去拜访露丝·罗丝的奶奶

options.en: Green Lawn, Connecticut according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 康涅狄格州的格林劳恩（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The kids visit Ruth Rose's grandmother, Gram Hathaway, on the island of Key West in Florida.
explain.zh: 孩子们去佛罗里达州的基韦斯特岛，拜访露丝·罗丝的奶奶哈撒韦奶奶。

q.en: At the airport, what does Dink overhear a whispering man plan to do?
q.zh: 在机场，丁克偷听到那个低声说话的男人在计划做什么？

options.en: Bake cookies for a party according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为派对烤饼干（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Take the money and 'drown the goose'

explain.en: Dink hears a man say 'take the dough and split' and 'drown the goose and disappear' — a plan to steal and run away.
explain.zh: 丁克听到一个男人说‘把钱分了’以及‘把鹅淹掉然后消失’——一个偷钱逃跑的计划。

q.en: What is the name painted on Spike and Chip's treasure boat?
q.zh: 斯派克和奇普的寻宝船上涂着什么名字？

options.en: The Silver Dolphin according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 银海豚号（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The kids see the letters being painted and learn the boat is called the Golden Goose.
explain.zh: 孩子们看到船上正在涂字母，得知这艘船叫‘金鹅号’。

q.en: What clue makes Dink think the man at the airport was Spike?
q.zh: 是什么线索让丁克认为机场那个男人就是斯派克？

options.en: A scar on his face according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他脸上的疤痕（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: An eagle-head tattoo on his ankle
options.zh: 他脚踝上有一个鹰头的纹身

explain.en: Dink had seen a man at the airport with an eagle-head ankle tattoo, and later spots the same tattoo on Spike.
explain.zh: 丁克在机场见过一个脚踝上有鹰头纹身的男人，后来在斯派克脚上也看到了同样的纹身。

q.en: How does Josh realize Spike's treasure is fake?
q.zh: 乔什是怎么发现斯派克的‘宝藏’是假的？

options.en: Spike said they cleaned silver with vinegar, but real silver needs a chemical bath for days
options.zh: 斯派克说他们用醋清洗银器，但真正的银器需要化学溶液浸泡好几天

options.en: The coins were made of plastic according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 硬币是塑料做的（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Josh reads that silver needs a special chemical solution for days to shine, but Spike claimed they used vinegar. The empty oxygen tank also shows they never really dove.
explain.zh: 乔什读到银器需要特殊化学溶液浸泡多日才能发亮，而斯派克却说他们用醋。氧气罐也是空的，说明他们从没真正去潜水。

q.en: What do Spike and Chip plan to do to their own boat?
q.zh: 斯派克和奇普打算对自己的船做什么？

options.en: Sink it with cinder blocks and run off with the money
options.zh: 用水泥砖把船沉掉，然后带着钱逃跑

options.en: Sell it to Gram Hathaway according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 把它卖给哈撒韦奶奶（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The kids hear the men plan to sink the Golden Goose with cinder blocks after collecting the investors' money.
explain.zh: 孩子们偷听到这两个人计划在拿到投资人的钱后，用水泥砖把‘金鹅号’沉掉。

q.en: How do the kids escape when the boat starts to sink?
q.zh: 船开始下沉时，孩子们是怎么逃生的？

options.en: They hide in the cabin according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他们藏在船舱里（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: They put on life vests and jump into the water, then the Coast Guard rescues them
options.zh: 他们穿上救生衣跳进海里，随后被海岸警卫队救起

explain.en: The kids scramble out, put on life vests, jump overboard, and are pulled from the water by the Coast Guard.
explain.zh: 孩子们爬出来穿上救生衣跳海，随后被海岸警卫队的船从水里救起。

q.en: Where had the gold and silver Spike showed actually been stolen from?
q.zh: 斯派克展示的那些金银其实是从哪里偷来的？

explain.en: The treasure was stolen from a Miami museum, which had offered a reward for its return.
explain.zh: 这些宝物是从迈阿密的一家博物馆偷来的，博物馆还悬赏找回。

q.en: What did the whispered words 'old cookies are loaded' really mean?
q.zh: 那句低声说的‘老饼干很有料（loaded）’实际上是什么意思？

options.en: Gram's friends had lots of money to invest
options.zh: 奶奶的朋友们很有钱，可以投资

options.en: The cookies were full of chocolate chips according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 饼干里全是巧克力豆（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: 'Loaded' meant rich — the crooks were after the money of Gram Hathaway and her wealthy friends.
explain.zh: ‘loaded’意思是‘很有钱’——骗子盯上的是哈撒韦奶奶和她那些有钱朋友的钱。

q.en: What reward do the kids receive for catching the thieves?
q.zh: 孩子们因为抓住小偷得到了什么奖励？

options.en: Plane tickets to Florida, Disney World passes, and money
options.zh: 去佛罗里达的机票、迪士尼世界的门票，还有一笔钱

options.en: A box of gold coins according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一盒金币（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Because the museum treasure was recovered, the kids get plane tickets, Disney passes, and cash as a reward.
explain.zh: 因为博物馆的宝物被找回，孩子们得到了机票、迪士尼门票和现金作为奖励。
